parameters.query: SELECT id, callback_id, execution_id, chat_id, expires_at, payload, payload->>'draft' as payload_draft, payload->>'notionBlockId' as payload_notion_block_id, payload->>'topic' as payload_topic FROM hitl_sessions WHERE status = 'pending' AND expires_at < NOW() AND payload->>'priority' = 'high' ORDER BY expires_at ASC LIMIT 10;
UPDATE hitl_sessions SET status = 'auto_published', resolved_at = NOW() WHERE callback_id = '{{ $('Save Published Auto').first().json.callbackId }}' RETURNING id, callback_id, status;

SELECT id, callback_id, execution_id, chat_id, expires_at, payload, payload->>'draft' as payload_draft, payload->>'notionBlockId' as payload_notion_block_id, payload->>'topic' as payload_topic FROM hitl_sessions WHERE status = 'pending' AND expires_at < NOW() AND payload->>'priority' = 'high' ORDER BY expires_at ASC LIMIT 10;
UPDATE hitl_sessions SET status = 'auto_published', resolved_at = NOW() WHERE callback_id = '{{ $('Save Published Auto').first().json.callbackId }}' RETURNING id, callback_id, status;
